name: Charlotte
description: The witch of desserts. Her nature is tenacity. What she desires is everything. She will never give up. Though she is capable of creating infinite amounts of any dessert she desires, she is unable to make the cheese that she loves most. If you have a piece of cheese, you can easily catch her off-guard. name: Elise Angel
description: Elise is Melida's cousin and a Holy Knight who can use mana unlike Melida. She boasts the most talent in her class despite her stoic, silent nature. (Source: ANN)

name: Fou
description: Fou is one of the main characters of Fate/Grand Order, acting as a mascot of sorts. It's a squirrel-like creature, "a cute animal" that appears to be able to freely walk around the Chaldea Security Organization. It is met by Fujimaru while it's alongside Mash and accompanies the two in their travels to different Singularities. ~!Fou is Merlin's familiar and a creature belonging to the Beast class, holding the title of Beast IV!~

name: Fuji
description: Fuji works at the same crossdressing bar as [Suou](https://anilist.co/character/321927/Suou) and [Kohaku](https://anilist.co/character/321929/Kohaku) with a persona of a calm and collected guy with purple hair. Both in and out of character, she has an lethargic attitude but she is very attentive to her surroundings and supports others from behind the scenes. In her free time, she draws doujinshi and is always searching for reference material for her works.

name: In-Gwi Yun
description: Known primarily as Queen, In-Gwi is the heroine in the series, an S-Class ranked second-year student and the current Wild's League champion. She is a mixed martial artist, proficient in nearly every form of martial arts, where she helps spar with each of the school clubs. Her initial encounter with Jae-Gu leads to misunderstanding, due to a bad experience with a boy in her childhood. She nevertheless quickly develops feelings for Jae-Gu, who does not fawn over her like everyone else.

name: Janica Faylover
description: She is the top student in her second year and is a spirit master who handles spirits. A girl who seems to be the embodiment of kindness and innocence. She also wants to live up to the expectations of those around her.

name: Juza Hyodo
description: He's a tough delinquent and lone wolf. He came to the Mankai Company's Autumn Troupes audition with little hope, but genuine intention and a passion for acting. However, his acting wasn't good at all. Despite this, Izumi saw the feelings put into it and accepted his application.

name: Kobachi Osaragi
description: Kobachi is [Miko](https://anilist.co/character/125886)'s classmate with the glasses and a member of the disciplinary committee. She has been looking after Miko for over 10 years. ~!Though she doesn't love him in a romantic way, she has liked Yu Ishigami since middle school. She believes that Tsubame Koyasu is a kind person and is therefore supportive of Ishigami's feelings for Tsubame, despite her friend Miko being in love with Ishigami as well.!~

name: Konata
description: Konata is a mysterious high school girl who confined a mangaka in his (The mangaka's) own room. ~!The reason she held him captive is so he can draw manga for her.!~ ~!Despite wearing a school uniform, Konata didn't really go to school. She bought foods and daily needs with the Mangaka's bank account.!~ ~!During the confinement, Konata learned how to cook so she can feed the Mangaka more proper and healthy food. name: Koutarou Natori
description: __Height:__ 175 cm (5'9") Natori is a member of the product development team at Lilia Drop, a company that manufactures makeup and bath products that are tremendously popular with women. He is the project planner for all the soaps the company makes. Natori-sans' sense of smell isn't inborn (like perfect pitch, etc.) He got better through practice, so he's a bit less sensitive when he's dozing or too tired to concentrate. He likes animals but sometimes has a hard time at zoos.
